stemHtml:
Choose the correct options. Alerting service should be provided to aircraft:

1. under air traffic control
2. that did not arrive after more than 15 minutes of the estimated time of arrival
3. whose last radio contact was more than 15 minutes ago
4. that have filed a flight plan
5. that are known to the ATS
6. that are known or believed to be subject to an act of unlawful interference
